headline: Equifax (EFX) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Weakness And Mixed Growth Signals
summary: Equifax (EFX) is back in focus after recent trading pressure, with the share price at $178.02 following negative returns over the past month and past 3 months. This performance is drawing attention to its current valuation and fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Equifax. Beyond the recent selloff, Equifax’s 1 day share price return of a 1.92% decline and 30 day share price return of a 9.84% decline sit alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of a 26.38% decline, pointing to fading...
